title: Board Automation based on Form Submission
excerpt: It would be nice to have an automation option that is triggered by a form submission creating a new item. The benefit would be to be able to create other automation actions, such as a notification, when a form is submitt…

posts.author: chrisl (Chris Lubarski)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be nice to have an automation option that is triggered by a form submission creating a new item. The benefit would be to be able to create other automation actions, such as a notification, when a form is submitted vs. having to make a work around automation with other triggers. We use our board for receiving marketing requests from our internal teams via a form and also use the same board to input our own projects/ tasks. Sometimes the current automation is triggered by us adding our own tasks vs. those from the form.

posts.author: kolaai (alfred)
posts.cookedHtml:
You could set up a group that receives the form items and then have an automation that will be triggered in that group.
Lastly, you can have another automation which will move the form items to the “main group”.

Hope this helps
